resume_text: Om Tripathi 91-9302115955 omtripathi734@gmail.com linkedin.com in om-tripathi Education Madhav Institute of Technology and Science, Artificial Intelligence and Robotics 2022 2026 Coursework Machine Learning, Data Structures, , Robotics , DBMS Projects Cricket Analysis and Prediction App Technologies used Java, Python, Spring Boot, Jsoup, MySQL, Flask, Machine Learning, React Sep 2024 - Nov 2024 Built a full-stack, machine learning-powered cricket analytics app to process and deliver live match data. Developed an XGBoost model trained on 25 years of ODI data, achieving 91 accuracy for ball-by-ball score predictions and team win probabilities using extensive feature engineering. Created interactive real-time dashboards to visualize match stats and player performance, providing actionable insights for users. E-Commerce Website Development Technologies Used HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB Designed and developed a fully functional e-commerce website from scratch, featuring product listings, shopping cart, user authentication, and order management. Implemented secure user login and registration using JWT authentication. Created a responsive user interface for seamless experience across desktop and mobile devices. Integrated payment gateway (e.g., Stripe or PayPal) for real-time transactions (if applicable). Developed RESTful APIs for product and order management using Node.js and Express. Managed product data and user information using MongoDB with Mongoose. Technologies Programming Languages C, C , Python, HTML, CSS, SQL ,JavaScript Software and Libraries Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, React ,Nodejs , Express Certification The complete web development bootcamp by Angela Yu ,Udemy, 2023 Data Structures in C ,Coding Ninjas, 2024

Full job description
Job Title: Frontend Developer Intern

Location: Baner, Pune, Maharashtra (On-site)

Apply Here: https://forms.office.com/r/GxMWysNmNs

https://dalnex.com/

https://www.linkedin.com/company/dalnex-iot-industry40-automation | LinkedIn

Key Responsibilities:

Help design and implement user-friendly interfaces that enhance the usability of IoT applications, ensuring seamless interaction with real-time data.
Implement and manage communication protocols such as MQTT and HTTP.
Work with backend systems to manage data ingestion, processing, and storage from various IoT sources.
Work with RESTful APIs to fetch and send data between the front-end and back-end services, enabling data persistence and IoT device management.
Build user-friendly dashboards for monitoring, control, and analytics of IoT devices.
Ensure the security and scalability of the web platform.
Build and maintain real-time dashboards in Angular, displaying live data from IoT devices, using MQTT for real-time updates and HTTP for fetching historical data.
Required Skills:

Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Angular
IoT Protocols: Knowledge of MQTT, HTTP/HTTPS, WebSockets
API Development: RESTful APIs, WebSockets, JSON, JWT

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹5,000.00 - ₹10,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person
